description: Extract function name and parameter values from the user query text to generate a properly formatted function call

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The raw user query text containing function call request with parameter values to extract

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string describing the available functions and their parameter schemas for reference

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the top-level key and its parameters as a nested object. Example: {"algebra.quadratic_roots": {"a": 1, "b": -3, "c": 2}}

fields.function_name: dict with parameter names and their extracted values

workflow_spec.name: Parse Function Call from Query
workflow_spec.description: Analyzes user query to extract function name and parameters, returning a properly formatted function call JSON structure
